title: Fiery Ethiopian Chicken Flatbread
description: A spicy, tender chicken topped on a fluffy injera flatbread, finished with single cream and a smoky tadka, perfect for a relaxed Sunday lunch.
instructions: Heat the molcajete over medium-low heat until the base is hot.
Add 1 tsp olive oil and swirl to coat the surface.
Stir in minced garlic and sauté until fragrant, about 30 seconds.
Add diced onion and cook until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Mix in berbere, smoked paprika, ground coriander, sea salt, and black pepper, cooking for 1 minute.
Add the diced chicken breast and cook until lightly browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Pour in single cream and lemon juice, simmer gently until the chicken is cooked through and the sauce thickens, about 5 minutes.
Garnish with chopped cilantro, serve immediately over a fresh injera flatbread and enjoy.
